title: Duterte Ally Flees to Evade I.C.C. Arrest Warrant After Chaos at Philippine Senate
summary_full: Senator Ronald dela Rosa, who is wanted by the International Criminal Court in The Hague, had been holed up in the building when shots rang out.
summary_public: Senator Ronald dela Rosa, who is wanted by the International Criminal Court in The Hague, had been holed up in the building when shots rang out.
